title: TV Off
why_this_song: TV Off by Kendrick Lamar (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "turn" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Few solid niggas left, but it's not enough
Niggas actin' bad, but somebody gotta do it
Shit gets crazy, scary, spooky, hilarious

exercises.prompt_en: "TV Off" was released in 2024. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "TV Off" foi lançada em 2024. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Kendrick Lamar one question about "TV Off", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Kendrick Lamar sobre "TV Off", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "TV Off" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "TV Off" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "TV Off" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "TV Off" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
